title: Committing a transaction with a failed ALTER TABLE may subtly corrupt schema
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE orders(order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
ALTER TABLE orders RENAME TO purchases;
key_bug_features: Committing transaction after failed ALTER TABLE operation
